title: Enhanced Vanilla+
description: Default! But with Quality of life tweaks and visuals
body:
## ENHANCED VANILLA+

**Small changes, big impact—improve your in-game experience with simple visual tweaks.**

[![modrinth-gallery](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/documentation/modrinth-gallery_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/project/5eJWF0lQ/gallery)

![Preview 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5eJWF0lQ/images/13c84c47a2d5d4c695658ce0e496bbe93627e079_350.webp)

This texture pack aims to enhance your Minecraft experience while maintaining the classic look and feel of the default vanilla style. It includes a variety of quality-of-life tweaks, such as improved visuals like: **Dark GUI**, **Small Utilities** (for better visibility), **Better Effects Particles** (for clear view and lag fix), and many more. Aiming to make the game more immersive and enjoyable.

![Preview 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5eJWF0lQ/images/378d5b66a8aeb26328873a5d47c539b8b6a17276_350.webp)

_Whether you're looking for small tweaks or practical changes, this pack is designed to improve your gameplay without straying too far from the original vanilla aesthetics._
